ddls:
CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executed query */,
  "hash" TEXT /* Hash representation of the query for quick identification */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* The actual SQL query text */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the query in seconds */,
  "optimized_time" REAL /* Time taken after optimization in seconds */,
  "nr_of_tables" INTEGER /* Number of tables involved in the query */,
  "order_of_execution" INTEGER /* Order in which the query was executed */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database where the query was executed */,
  "query_tags" TEXT /* Tags or labels associated with the query */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the query was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables_used" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query to which this table usage is related */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table used in the query */,
  "table_schema" TEXT /* Schema of the table used in the query */,
  "table_alias" TEXT /* Alias used for the table in the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tables_used_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log entry */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being logged */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time in seconds */,
  "optimized_time" REAL /* Optimized execution time in seconds */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., INFO, WARNING, ERROR) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization strategy */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query to which this strategy is applied */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the optimization strategy */,
  "applied_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was applied */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of optimization strategy (e.g., indexing, caching, rewriting) */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization strategy (e.g., applied, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimization_strategies_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)
